nodes.label: Customer Browser
nodes.notes: Customer-facing checkout page. Scope: in-scope if PAN is entered here.

nodes.label: Perimeter Firewall
nodes.notes: Req 1: All inbound/outbound traffic must be documented and restricted.

nodes.label: WAF
nodes.notes: Req 6.4: Web-facing applications must be protected by a WAF.

nodes.label: E-Commerce Server
nodes.notes: Req 6: Maintain secure systems. No CHD stored in logs or app memory.

nodes.label: Payment Gateway
nodes.notes: Req 4: Encrypt PAN in transit. Gateway must be a listed P2PE or validated service.

nodes.label: Tokenization Vault
nodes.notes: Tokens replace PAN for storage and recurring billing. Vault reduces scope.

nodes.label: HSM
nodes.notes: Req 3.7: Key management. Use FIPS 140-2 level 3 validated device.

nodes.label: Visa / Mastercard
nodes.notes: External — card brand network. Out of merchant CDE scope.

nodes.label: Token Store (DB)
nodes.notes: Req 3.3: Stores tokens only — no PAN. Encryption at rest still recommended.

nodes.label: Acquiring Bank
nodes.notes: External — settlement counterparty. Out of merchant CDE scope.
